name: cri-tools
title: cri-tools
summary: command line tool used for creating OCI images
description:
command line tool used for creating OCI images
This package contains a series of debugging and validation tools for Kubelet
CRI, which includes:
- crictl: CLI for kubelet CRI.
- critest: validation test suites for kubelet CRI.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use crictl because command line tool used for creating OCI images.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use crictl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `crictl [options] [args]` as documented upstream for crictl.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair crictl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `crictl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
